category_sources: Official Zig homepage describes Zig as a general-purpose programming language and toolchain.
source_facts.description says Zig is a programming language designed for robustness, optimality, and clarity.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use Zig as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Zig documentation page is the Zig Language Reference and lists versioned documentation including 0.16.0.
Official Zig homepage links Documentation and Learn sections.
repo_sources: Official Zig homepage states the Zig repository is at https://codeberg.org/ziglang/zig.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official Zig homepage.
tags_sources: Official documentation is the Zig Language Reference.
Official homepage says Zig is a language and toolchain and highlights C/C++ interoperability and cross-compilation.
source_facts.description identifies Zig as a programming language.
